stop.session_detached_started: Started stopping session '{session}' in the background.
stop.session_missing_cleared: Session '{session}' was not found. Runtime state was cleared.
task.overall_review.description:
Review the full diff and decide approve or requestchange.
If you choose requestchange, fill in summary / details / rework_targets / findings correctly.
Dispatcher will aggregate requestchange results and redistribute the follow-up work.
task.overall_review.title: Overall review cycle {cycle_id} ({short_sig})
task.pre_review_gate.description:
This is the test gate before the overall review. Run tests against the current implementation diff. If a failure is caused by this change, fix it and rerun the tests.

Completion criteria:
- Run the necessary tests and record the results in summary / details
- Fix every failure caused by this change before finishing
- If anything is unclear, do not guess; use create-question.sh
task.pre_review_gate.title: Pre-review test gate ({short_sig})
task.review_rework.description.with_note:
Overall review cycle {cycle_id} returned requestchange.
Review every note listed in `rework_note_paths` before you edit.
When the rework is complete, finish the task with `task-finish.sh --result success`.
task.review_rework.description.without_n:
Overall review cycle {cycle_id} returned requestchange.
Address every review issue and update the implementation.
When the rework is complete, finish the task with `task-finish.sh --result success`.
task.review_rework.title: Review follow-up (cycle {cycle_id})
task_finish.error.inflight_only: Error: only inflight tasks can be completed (current: {state})
task_finish.error.invalid_result: Error: --result must be one of success|failure|blocked.
task_finish.error.invalid_review_decisio: Error: --review-decision must be one of approve|requestchange.
task_finish.error.rework_target_required: Error: requestchange requires at least one --rework-target.
task_finish.info.artifact_preserved: Preserved existing research artifact without overwriting it: {artifact_path}
task_heartbeat.error.inflight_only: Error: heartbeat is only allowed for inflight tasks (current: {state})
update_command_status.error.command_file: Error: command file was not found: {output_path}
update_command_status.error.invalid_stat: Error: --status must be one of pending|inflight|done|blocked.
usage.request_send:
Usage:
  ./scripts/request-send.sh --target <agent> --message <text> [--title <text>] [--channel agent]

Examples:
  ./scripts/request-send.sh --target implementer1 --message "Review the task"
  ./scripts/request-send.sh --channel agent --target coordinator --title "Question" --message "User input is required"
usage.send_msg:
Usage:
  ./scripts/send-msg.sh <target> <message>

target:
  coordinator | task_author | dispatcher | investigation | analyst | tester | implementerN | reviewerN
usage.write_task:
Usage:
  ./scripts/write-task.sh \
    --persona <persona> \
    --title <title> \
    --description <description> \
    --write-file <path> [--write-file <path> ...] \
    [--id <task_id>] \
    [--type <implementation|investigation|analyst|rework|review>] \
    [--depends-on <task_id>]... \
    [--read-file <path>]... \
    [--exclusive-group <group>] \
    [--assigned-to <implementer1|reviewer1|investigation|analyst|tester>] \
    [--command-id <command_id>] \
    [--result-artifact-path <path>] \
    [--output <path>]

Example:
  ./scripts/write-task.sh \
    --id task_refactor_dispatcher_001 \
    --type implementation \
    --persona implementer \
    --title "Add dispatcher lock coordination" \
    --description "Handle write_files locking" \
    --write-file scripts/watch-reports.sh \
    --write-file scripts/agent-comm-common.sh \
    --depends-on task_refactor_base_000
write_command_task.error.invalid_priorit: Error: --priority must be one of high|medium|low.
write_task.error.dep_cycle: Error: depends_on contains a cycle. The task could not be created.
write_task.error.dep_not_found: Error: depends_on target was not found: {dependency}
write_task.error.invalid_type: Error: type must be one of implementation|investigation|analyst|rework|review (got: {task_type})
write_task.error.research_active: Error: implementation tasks cannot be created while research tasks are still active. Retry after investigation and analyst complete.
write_task.error.self_dependency: Error: self dependency is not allowed: {task_id} -> {dependency}
write_task.error.task_exists: Error: the same task_id already exists: {task_id}
write_task.error.write_file_empty: Error: write_files cannot contain an empty value.
write_task.error.write_files_required: Error: write_files is required. Specify at least one path.
